title: Automated Code Review Comments
scenario: Write a code review comment for a pull request that introduces a new feature to an existing API endpoint. The comment should mention the improvements made, point out potential issues, and provide suggestions for further improvement. The target code is a Python function with 50 lines of code, and the comment should be no more than 100 words. The comment should be in a formal tone and address the reviewer's concerns.
constraints: Must be in a formal tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the comment adheres to the given constraints.
Check if the tone of the comment is formal and professional.
Check if the comment accurately describes improvements made and points out potential issues.
Check if the comment is clear and easy to understand.
